svg.title: Logistics delay pipeline DAG
svg.desc: Five-stage Airflow DAG: Ingest, Validate, Transform, Train, Evaluate, with supporting tools shown per stage.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the ingest stage in detail')
sendPrompt('How does the data contract validation work?')
sendPrompt('What feature engineering transformers are used?')
sendPrompt('How is the XGBoost model trained and tracked?')
sendPrompt('What are the model promotion thresholds?')
